---
name: New Provider Request / 新 Provider 请求
about: Suggest a new AI provider to track / 建议追踪新的 AI Provider
title: "[Provider] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Provider Name / Provider 名称
<!-- e.g., Groq, Together AI, Fireworks -->

## Provider Type / Provider 类型
<!-- e.g., inference-provider, aggregator, vendor-direct / 如：推理提供商、聚合平台、厂商直连 -->

## Models to Track / 需追踪的模型
<!-- List key models with approximate pricing / 列出关键模型及大致定价 -->

## MCP Resources (if any) / MCP 资源（如有）
<!-- Does this provider offer MCP servers? / 该 Provider 是否提供 MCP 服务器？ -->

## Data Sources / 数据来源
<!-- Links to pricing page, API docs, models endpoint / 定价页、API 文档、模型端点的链接 -->
